strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent infrastructure and tooling contributions at re:cinq, including MCP code generators
Entrepreneurial initiative with long-standing open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective) used by NGOs
concerns: No explicit evidence of AI/ML product development or published AI platforms (only AI-agent tooling)
Lack of demonstrated cloud platform strategy experience or customer advisory roles in cloud/AI
No advanced degree in AI-related field; highest education is BS in Computer Science
response.justification: The candidate has 15+ years of engineering experience with direct contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, satisfying the core technical requirement. However, there is no evidence of designing or shipping AI-powered cloud products, advising strategic customers on AI adoption, or leading cloud product strategy — all critical responsibilities. While the open-source GISCollective shows initiative, it is geospatial, not AI-focused. The absence of a Master’s/PhD in AI and lack of documented cloud platform strategy work are significant gaps for a director-level AI strategy role.
